operations.description: List of SIF operations to execute in order. The whole list runs in a single database transaction — any failure rolls back the entire batch.

op.description: Operation type. Use 'link'/'unlink' to attach or detach two existing entities across a many-to-many relation. Use 'action' for domain-specific business logic.

entity.description: Ontology class name (e.g. Customer, Policy, Pet). Required for query/create/update/delete.

action.description: Action only: name of the registered domain action to invoke.

params.description: Action only: parameters to pass to the action.

fields.description: Query only: which fields to return. Omit for all fields.

relations.description: Query only: chain of relations to traverse for joins.

entity.description: Ontology class on the other end.

filters.description: Equality filters on the related entity.

resolve.description: Create only: resolve related entities for FK values. Keys are relationship names, values are {entity, filters} lookup specs.

relation.description: Link/unlink only: ontology relation traversing a junction table.

from.description: Link/unlink only: {entity, filters} specifying one end of the link.

to.description: Link/unlink only: {entity, filters} specifying the other end.

limit.description: Query only: max rows to return.
